# BlossomFS

> FUSE filesystem for Blossom/Nostr blob storage. Mount remote blobs as local files. Upload, download, and organize with standard Unix tools.

## Install

```bash
sudo apt-get install -y fuse3 libfuse3-dev pkg-config build-essential
cargo build --release
# Binary: ./target/release/blossomfs
```

## Mount (read-only)

```bash
mkdir -p /mnt/bfs
blossomfs mount \
  --npub npub1... \
  --server https://blossom.psbt.me \
  --mountpoint /mnt/bfs
```

Unmount: `fusermount3 -u /mnt/bfs`

## Mount (read-write)

```bash
blossomfs mount \
  --npub npub1... \
  --server https://blossom.psbt.me \
  --mountpoint /mnt/bfs \
  --read-only=false \
  --nsec-file /path/to/nsec.txt
```

Write files directly into the mount. BlossomFS uploads on close via BUD-02/BUD-11. Delete with `rm`.

## Mount (persistent directories)

```bash
blossomfs mount \
  --npub npub1... \
  --server https://blossom.psbt.me \
  --relay wss://relay.damus.io \
  --mountpoint /mnt/bfs \
  --persist mydrive \
  --nsec-file /path/to/nsec.txt
```

User-created directories survive unmount/remount via kind 30078 Nostr events. Auto-generated `/public/` tree comes from BUD-12 listing each mount.

## Directory layout

```
/public/<pubkey>/servers/<host>/     BUD-12 blobs from each server
/public/<pubkey>/all-servers/         All blobs deduplicated
/drives/<d-tag>/                      Legacy Blossom Drives (kind 30563)
/metadata/<sha256>/                   NIP-94 file metadata (kind 1063)
/repos/<pubkey>/<repo>/               NIP-34 git repos
/tollgate/<project>/<version>/        Tollgate releases
README.txt                            Mount info and usage
STATUS.txt                            TTL and free-period status
```

## Agent cloud storage patterns

Store agent artifacts (logs, configs, checkpoints) on Blossom:

```bash
# Write a file (uploads to Blossom server)
echo '{"task":"completed","score":0.95}' > /mnt/bfs/results.json

# Create persistent directory structure
mkdir -p /mnt/bfs/agent/checkpoints
cp checkpoint.json /mnt/bfs/agent/checkpoints/

# Read back on next session (after remount with --persist)
cat /mnt/bfs/agent/checkpoints/checkpoint.json
```

## Config file

Optional TOML at `~/.config/blossomfs/config.toml`:

```toml
npub = "npub1..."
server = ["https://blossom.psbt.me"]
relay = ["wss://relay.damus.io"]
mountpoint = "/mnt/bfs"
max_cache_size = 500     # MB, 0=unlimited
ttl_secs = 31536000      # 1 year (blobs are immutable)
```

CLI flags override config. Env vars prefixed `BLOSSOMFS_`.

## CLI flags

| Flag | Default | Description |
|------|---------|-------------|
| `--mountpoint` | required | FUSE mount path |
| `--npub` | - | Bech32 pubkey |
| `--pubkey` | - | Hex pubkey |
| `--server` | - | Blossom server URL (repeatable) |
| `--relay` | - | Nostr relay for discovery (repeatable) |
| `--manifest` | - | Local JSON blob descriptors |
| `--read-only` | true | false for RW upload mode |
| `--nsec-file` | - | File containing nsec for RW/persist |
| `--persist` | - | Drive name for directory persistence |
| `--cache-dir` | /tmp/blossomfs | Local blob cache |
| `--max-cache-size` | 0 | Max cache MB (0=unlimited, FIFO eviction) |
| `--ttl-secs` | 31536000 | FUSE cache TTL |
| `--config` | - | Path to TOML config |
| `--daemon` | false | Fork to background |
